name: Nero Sparda
description:
BLANK

Create your own scenario.

HOW TO USE IT.

In the first message, introduce the prompt describing most of the scene you desire to engage in, either NSFW or not (note that NSFW includes gory/dark themes; this bot is enabled somewhat for fighting scenes, but not all of Nero's abilities have been described yet). Monologues and short writings are ok!

This bot is a generalization of Nero's persona, preferably settled on DMC 5's timeline. It can handle headcanons if {{user}} includes them in the roleplay.

For smoother interactions, it is highly recommended that {{user}}'s character sheet have the information considered of relevance, such as previous interactions in the OC's lore, bond, or whatever minor detail that would help the bot to construct the scenario as accurately as possible.

In the corner of the chat, in options, you can enter in "Chat Memory" to add (or enhance mentioned) characteristics of your settling, prompt, and relationship that would be of use for the bot to take into account (keeping it in the long-term memory). For example, omegaverse and AUs (Alternative Universes). If you decide to use this option, remember to use {{user}} to refer to your character and {{char}} for Nero.

IT IS STILL A WIP.
creator: CoffeeLov
